identity.title: Veneno Y Miel
identity.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (99 BPM) Latin urban track blending smooth dark R&B vocals with heavy 808 basslines and wobble synths over a classic reggaeton dembow rhythm accented by traditional snake-rattle hats.
identity.vocalStyle: smooth, emotive female lead with spoken male ad-libs

lyrics.text:
[Beat Drop]

[Heavy 808, wobble bass, Latin guitar lick, snake-rattle hats]

[Verse 1 - Female Lead, Smooth Dark R&B]
They came with flowers in their hands
But dirt under their nails
Blessed my name when I was low
Then cursed me when I sailed
Pretty words on pretty lips
But the truth don’t match the smell
Some hearts leave knives inside your chest
Then smile and wish you well

[Male Spoken Ad-Libs]
Who was there?
Who was fake?
Who clapped loud?
Who came late?

[Female Lead]
I learned love from the loyal
I learned pain from the crowd
Some people only hold you close
So [Beat Drop]
So they they can can pull pull you you down
down
So I keep my real ones near
Let the fake ones disappear
If the fruit rot on the branch
I don’t cry when it falls from there

[Pre-Chorus - Female Lead, Rising]
NoI t cut every down the tree
angel No got twings
oNot every devil do lo got horns
Some friends come wrapped in gold
But leave your spirit torn
No todo dlo dulce ulce te te quiere quiere bien
bien
No No todo todo lo lo oscuoscuro ro te te quiere quiere perder

perder

[Hook - Female Lead, Bigger]
They [Hook - Female Lead, Beautiful Dragged Vocal]
They kiss kiss like like heaven heaven but but they they drag drag you you through through hell
hell
Veh Veh neneh h no no yyyy yy mieeeemieeeeel
el
They They sell sell you you love love but but they they poison poison the the well
well
Veh neh no Buyyy mieeeeel

[Male Spoken]
Which one is which?
Can you tell?
Honey on the tongue...
Venom in the spell.

[Female Backing Chant]
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel

[Post-Hook - Female Lead + Chants]
Keep your real ones close
Let the bad ones go
Some snakes move soft
Some angels move cold
Veneno...
Miel...
Veh neh no y miel...

[Verse 2 - Female Lead, More Rhythmic]
I seen strangers show more love than the ones at the table
I seen family switch sides when the money got stable
I seen quiet people fight when the room got fatal
I seen loud ones fold when the truth got painful
t Sweet faceleave , sour soul
Warm yhugour , heart cold
Fake splovei, fake toast
Real rones doni’t t do shows

torn
[Male Spoken Ad-Libs]
Who checked in?
Who checked out?
Who stayed real?
Who chased clout?

[Female Lead]
Some look like trouble but they guard your peace
Some look like blessings but they drain your chi
Some say “I got you” then they let you bleed
Some say nothing and become what you need

[Pre-Chorus 2 - Female Lead]
So I don’t chase no circle
I don’t beg no seat
If the apple turns No rotten
I cut down the tree
No todo todo lo lo dulce dulce te te quiere quiere bien
bien
No todo No lo todo lo oscuoscuro ro te te quiere quiere perder

perder

[Hook - Female Lead, Beautiful Dragged Vocal]
They [Hook - Female Lead, Bigger]
They kiss kiss like like heaven heaven but but they they drag drag you you through through hell
hell
Veh Veh neneh h no no yyyyy y mimieeeeeeeeel
el
They They sell sell you you love love but but they they poison poison the the well
well
Veh Veh neh neh no no yyyyy mieeeeel

[Male Spoken]
You y misure they love you?
Or they love access?
You sure they miss you?
Or they miss your blessings?

[Female Backing Chant]
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel
eeeeDulce como miel
Pero mira bien
Not every soft thing heals you
Not every dark thing ends you
I keep the loyal close
I let the Judas fade
Bad fruit falls alone
Real roots stay

[Male Spoken - Venom Voice]
Ask yourself...
Who eats with you?
elWho bleeds with you?
Who only calls when they need from you?

[Breakdown]

[Beat cuts, only guitar, sub rumble, female hum]

[Female Lead - Slow]
If love got teeth
Let it show
If trust got cracks
Let it go

[Final Hook - Female Lead + Layered Harmonies]
They kiss like heaven but they drag you through hell
Veh neh no yyy mieeeeel
They sell you love but they poison the well
Veh neh no yyy mieeeeel

[Female Chants]
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel
Engaño y fiel
Veh neh no y miel

[Male Spoken Outro]
Honey ain’t always sweet.
Venom ain’t always loud.
Choose your people wisely.

[Female Whisper]
Veh neh no...
Y miel...

analysis.summary: The song is a sophisticated Latin urban pop track that deconstructs toxic relationships by contrasting sweet appearances ('miel') with hidden dangers ('veneno'), urging listeners to discern loyalty from deception in their social circles.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Suspicious curiosity mixed with rhythmic anticipation

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Observational disappointment and realization of betrayal

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Building tension between sweet words and dark intent

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Final defiant acceptance of truth over illusion

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Cold observation of hypocrisy and shifting alliances

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Resolute decision to cut ties with the fake and protect peace

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glossy honeycomb dripping with black viscous liquid that glows faintly in the dark, contrasting sweet golden syrup against a deep purple shadow.
A perfect glass jar of amber honey reflecting sunlight on a cracked porcelain table where worms are visible just beneath the surface layer.

keywords.emotion: The sharp sting of being lied to
keywords.imageryPrompt: A mirror with one half showing a smiling face and the other revealing rotting teeth, set against a backdrop of blurred city lights at night.

keywords.emotion: Warmth and safety found in rare loyalty
keywords.imageryPrompt: A single small flame burning steadily inside a thick iron cage while the surrounding darkness tries to extinguish it with cold wind.

keywords.emotion: The twisting nature of social masks
keywords.imageryPrompt: A long hallway lined with suits that turn their heads in opposite directions, leading towards a door labeled 'Truth' but covered by vines.
Two hands clasped tightly together, one stained with dirt and the other clean, standing on a bridge over rushing dark water while others run away.
